name: SI-SDMK - AI Agent Internal + Public READY

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { answer: $json.denied_reason || 'Unauthorized.', source: 'n8n', intent: 'unauthorized', entities: {}, tool: '-', verification: 'denied', confidence: 0, candidates: [], selected_candidate: null, tool_result: null, suggestions: [], request_id: $json.request_id || null } }];

const answer = $json.denied_reason || $json.refusal || 'Maaf, informasi tersebut belum tersedia pada QnA publik SI-SDMK. Silakan login atau hubungi admin.';
return [{ json: { answer, source: 'n8n', intent: $json.intent || 'public_qna', entities: {}, tool: '-', verification: $json.authorized ? 'denied_private_request' : 'denied', confidence: 0, candidates: [], selected_candidate: null, tool_result: null, suggestions: $json.authorized ? ['Silakan login untuk pertanyaan internal', 'Hubungi admin SI-SDMK'] : [], request_id: $json.request_id || null, conversation_id: $json.conversation_id || null, sourceTools: [], retrievalStatus: 'denied', meta: { approvalRequired: false, workflow: 'sisdmk-public-chat' } } }];

meta.description: Import-ready SI-SDMK n8n workflow. Uses Webhook lastNode responses, supports /sisdmk-ai, /sisdmk-ai-pegawai-search, and /sisdmk-public-chat. Uses incoming x-ai-secret/x-api-key and approved Next.js internal tools only; no raw SQL and no env access in Code nodes.
